name: iron-moth
flavor_texts: This Pokémon resembles an unknown object described in a paranormal magazine as a UFO sent to observe humanity.
No records exist of this species being caught. Data is lacking, but the Pokémon’s traits match up with an object described in an old book.
text: Iron-moth is the Paradox Pokémon. It is a fire and poison-type Pokémon. Abilities: quark-drive. Base stats — HP: 80, Attack: 70, Defense: 60, Sp. Atk: 140, Sp. Def: 110, Speed: 110. Evolution line: iron-moth. Lore: This Pokémon resembles an unknown object described in a paranormal magazine as a UFO sent to observe humanity. No records exist of this species being caught. Data is lacking, but the Pokémon’s traits match up with an object described in an old book.
